theoryRules.label: Evelyn staged the body to recover the ledger
theoryRules.conclusion: Evelyn killed Rowan and used Black Hollow Station to hide motive and frame Silas.
theoryRules.notes: Unlocks only when physical staging and ledger motive are both available.

theoryRules.label: Silas as convenient station culprit
theoryRules.conclusion: Silas can be accused if the ledger is missed, but the runtime should treat this as a false frame.
theoryRules.notes: Supports the playable bad ending without rewriting canon.
